title: helianthemum variabile subvar. micropetalum
intro: Helianthemum variabile subvar. micropetalum, also known as rockrose, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Cistaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids, which have been shown to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Rockrose can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
